item.text: I’ll use Blast for pressure, spend board supply on a raider if the engine allows it, and focus damage into P2’s guardian while preserving central control.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-007.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-007\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-007.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-007.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-007\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":4},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"target\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-007.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-007.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-007.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, recruited another raider, and concentrated capped burst attacks into P2'"'s guardian.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: spend supply on immediate board presence, keep central attackers forward, and use Blast damage across separate attacks to push through the damage cap while weakening P2's main blocker.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-007.board.result.json"'

cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-007.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-007\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":1},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}

bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-007.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-007.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-007\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":3,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":4},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-007-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-start-1\",\"target\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-marksman-start-4\",\"target\":\"P2-guardian-start-3\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}

bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-007.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-007.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-007.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, recruited another raider, and concentrated capped burst attacks into P2'"'s guardian.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: spend supply on immediate board presence, keep central attackers forward, and use Blast damage across separate attacks to push through the damage cap while weakening P2's main blocker.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-007.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-007.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-007`.

Deck line: played `blast`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `4` money and `2` damage.

Board line: raider moved to `(4,5)`, marksman moved to `(7,5)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-007-1` at `(10,1)`. Raider and marksman both attacked `P2-guardian-start-3`, dealing `12` total damage with capped deck damage split across the attacks.

Rationale: this spends supply for immediate board pressure, keeps P1 contesting the middle, and uses Blast damage efficiently to nearly remove P2’s main blocker. Strict validation passed.
